zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Faucigny於1138年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯豪-薩福福奧尼時，她的父親Seigneur Aymon Ier de Faucigny le Hardi30歲，母親Clemencia de Brançion18歲。她於大約1164年與Guillaume III de MONTLUÇON結婚。她去世於1230年4月8日在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯享年92歲，埋葬在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉皮-德也崔蒙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix de Faucigny于1138年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯豪-薩福福奧尼时，她的父亲Seigneur Aymon Ier de Faucigny le Hardi30岁，母亲Clemencia de Brançion18岁。她于大约1164年与Guillaume III de MONTLUÇON结婚。她去世于1230年4月8日在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯享年92岁，埋葬在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉皮-德也崔蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Faucigny was born in 1138, in Faucigny, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Seigneur Aymon Ier de Faucigny le Hardi, was 30 and her mother, Clemencia de Brançion, was 18. She married Guillaume III de MONTLUÇON about 1164. She died on 8 April 1230, in Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 92, and was buried in Saint-Pierre-d'Entremont, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix de Faucigny est née en 1138, à Faucigny, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Seigneur Aymon Ier de Faucigny le Hardi, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Clemencia de Brançion, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume III de MONTLUÇON environ 1164. Elle est décédée le 8 avril 1230, à Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Pierre-d'Entremont, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de Faucigny 1138 in Faucigny, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Seigneur Aymon Ier de Faucigny le Hardi 30 und ihre Mutter Clemencia de Brançion 18. Sie hat um 1164 Guillaume III de MONTLUÇON geheiratet. Sie starb am 8. April 1230 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Pierre-d'Entremont, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Faucigny è nata il nel 1138 nel Faucigny, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Seigneur Aymon Ier de Faucigny le Hardi, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Clemencia de Brançion, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume III de MONTLUÇON circa 1164. Morì il 8 aprile 1230, nel Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 92 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Pierre-d'Entremont, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Faucignyが1138年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-サボイファウシグニーで生まれた時，父Seigneur Aymon Ier de Faucigny le Hardiは30歳，母Clemencia de Brançionは18歳であった。約1164年にGuillaume III de MONTLUÇONと結婚した。彼女は1230年4月8日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスで92歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスサボイサイント-パエレ-ド'エントレモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Faucigny(이)가 1138년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 하테-사보이 파시그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Seigneur Aymon Ier de Faucigny le Hardi(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clemencia de Brançion(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1164년 Guillaume III de MONTLUÇON(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1230년 4월 8일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 서아보이 세인트-피레-드'트렘트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Faucigny nasceu em 1138, em Faucigny, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Seigneur Aymon Ier de Faucigny le Hardi, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Clemencia de Brançion, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume III de MONTLUÇON aproximadamente 1164. Ela faleceu em 8 de abril de 1230, em Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 92 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Pierre-d'Entremont, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix de Faucigny родилась в 1138 г. в местности фаусигни, хауте-савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Seigneur Aymon Ier de Faucigny le Hardi было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Clemencia de Brançion, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume III de MONTLUÇON около 1164 г. Она умерла 8 апреля 1230 г. в местности арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 92 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-пьирре-д'ентремонт, савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

sm.from 1160 to 1208: mai le 1160 e o'o I le 1208

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix de Faucigny nació en 1138, en Faucigny, Haute-Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Seigneur Aymon Ier de Faucigny le Hardi, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Clemencia de Brançion, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Guillaume III de MONTLUÇON aproximadamente 1164. Murió el 8 de abril de 1230, en Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 92 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Pierre-d'Entremont, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
